name: RAGE:MP
description: RAGE Multiplayer server template for GTA V multiplayer projects. It uses bambutz/ragemp, persists /ragemp, and exposes the UDP game port plus the TCP HTTP port.

install.script:
#!/bin/sh
set -eu
mkdir -p /mnt/server/resources /mnt/server/packages /mnt/server/plugins /mnt/server/maps /mnt/server/dotnet/resources /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/dotnet ]; then
cat > /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/dotnet <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
exit 0
EOF
fi
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/libssl.so.1.1 ] || [ ! -f /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/libcrypto.so.1.1 ]; then
  curl -fsSL -o /tmp/libssl1.1.deb http://security.debian.org/debian-security/pool/updates/main/o/openssl/libssl1.1_1.1.1w-0+deb11u5_amd64.deb
  rm -rf /tmp/libssl1.1
  mkdir -p /tmp/libssl1.1
  dpkg-deb -x /tmp/libssl1.1.deb /tmp/libssl1.1
  cp /tmp/libssl1.1/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so.1.1 /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/libssl.so.1.1
  cp /tmp/libssl1.1/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so.1.1 /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/libcrypto.so.1.1
fi
cat > /tmp/adpanel-ragemp-acl.xml <<'EOF'
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<acl xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <group name="Everyone">
    <acl name="Default" />
    <object name="user.*" />
    <object name="resource.*" />
  </group>
  <acl name="Default" />
</acl>
EOF
for target in /mnt/server/acl.xml /mnt/server/dotnet/acl.xml /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/acl.xml /mnt/server/resources/acl.xml; do
  if [ ! -f "$target" ]; then
    cp /tmp/adpanel-ragemp-acl.xml "$target"
  fi
done
chmod +x /mnt/server/dotnet/runtime/dotnet
chmod -R 777 /mnt/server
